ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "squad_img" TEXT /* File path to the team's squad image */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the current team manager */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current team coach */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* File path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "player_img" TEXT /* File path to the player's image */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Player's preferred foot (e.g., left, right) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player (e.g., healthy, injured) */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* History of player's injuries (e.g., JSON array of injury records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of player statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "on_start_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of matches started */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated */,
  "points_average" REAL /* Average points per match */,
  "last_5_games_points" TEXT /* Points scored in the last 5 games (JSON array) */,
  "avg_last_5_games" REAL /* Average points in the last 5 games */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "successful_passes" INTEGER /* Number of successful passes */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets (for goalkeepers) */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded (for goalkeepers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_details" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match detail */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_number" TEXT /* Match number (e.g., J_11, J_10) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "opponent_team" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played in the match */,
  "substitution" TEXT /* Substitution status (e.g., starter, substituted in, substituted out) */,
  "yellow_card" INTEGER /* Whether the player received a yellow card */,
  "red_card" INTEGER /* Whether the player received a red card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_details_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, manager, data analyst) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions (e.g., JSON array of permissions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
